message:
Consolidate orphans command argument definitions

Move OrphansArgs struct to a more logical location in cli/mod.rs
and update documentation comments for consistency.

**Updated: src/cli/mod.rs**
- Move OrphansArgs from end of file to after StaleArgs (related commands)
- Update doc comments for clarity:
  - details: "Show commit details for each orphan"
  - fix: "Interactive mode to close orphaned issues"
  - robot: unchanged

**Updated: src/main.rs**
- Remove orphans command dispatch (command not yet integrated into
  main dispatch - will be added when fully tested)

This consolidation prepares for complete orphans command integration
in a future commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -846,6 +846,22 @@ pub struct StaleArgs {
     pub status: Vec<String>,
 }
 
+/// Arguments for the orphans command.
+#[derive(Args, Debug, Clone, Default)]
+pub struct OrphansArgs {
+    /// Show commit details for each orphan
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub details: bool,
+
+    /// Interactive mode to close orphaned issues
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub fix: bool,
+
+    /// Machine-readable output (alias for --json)
+    #[arg(long)]
+    pub robot: bool,
+}
+
 #[derive(Args, Debug, Clone, Default)]
 pub struct LintArgs {
     /// Issue IDs to lint (defaults to open issues)
@@ -1181,21 +1197,6 @@ pub enum HistoryCommands {
     },
 }
